metadata.description: The region to deploy the network resources to.
Determines whether or not to deploy the virtual network.
Determines whether or not to deploy the resource group for the virtual network.
Conditional. The name of the resource group to deploy the virtual network to. Required when "deployVnet" is "true".
Conditional. The name of the virtual network. Required when "deployVnet" is "true".
Conditional. The address prefixes for the virtual network. Required when "deployVnet" is "true".
Optional. The subnets to create within the virtual network. Each item must include "name", "addressPrefix", and "purpose" (hosts | privateEndpoints | functionApp).
Optional. The routing method to use for the virtual network subnets.
Optional. When using NVA routing, determines if AVD service bypass routes should be added to the route table. These routes allow AVD service traffic to bypass the NVA.
Optional. Enables RDP Shortpath for managed networks (ExpressRoute or VPN). Adds an NSG rule allowing inbound UDP 3390 from VirtualNetwork.

Optional. Enables RDP Shortpath for public networks using STUN/ICE. Deploys a NAT Gateway for cone-shaped NAT, adds AVD service bypass routes on NVA deployments, and adds an NSG rule allowing inbound UDP 3390 from Internet.
Optional. Determines if the resources should be named with the resource type at the end.
Conditional. The IP Address the network virtual appliance. Required when "defaultRouting" is "nva".
Optional. The custom DNS servers to use for the virtual network.
Optional. Determines if DDoS network protection should be deployed.
Optional. The resource id of the hub virtual network to which the virtual network should be peered.
Optional. Determines if a virtual network gateway is present on the hub virtual network.
Optional. The resource Id of an existing log analytics workspace to which to send nsg diagnostic logs.
Optional. The subscription id of the subscription to where the private DNS zones should be deployed.
Optional. Determines if the private DNS zones resource group should be deployed.
Conditional. The name of the private DNS zones resource group. Required when any of the private DNS Zones are deployed based on the "createZone" parameters.
Optional. Determines if the Azure Backup private DNS zone should be created.
Optional. The Air-Gapped Cloud Recovery Services RegionCode.
Optional. The Resource Id of the existing Azure Backup Private DNS Zone.
Optional. Determines if the Azure Blob Storage private DNS zone should be created.
Optional. The Resource Id of the existing Azure Blob Storage Private DNS Zone.
Optional. Determines if the Azure Files Storage private DNS zone should be created.
Optional. The Resource Id of the existing Azure Files Storage Private DNS Zone.
Optional. Determines if the Azure Queue Storage private DNS zone should be created.
Optional. The Resource Id of the existing Azure Queue Storage Private DNS Zone.
Optional. Determines if the Azure Table Storage private DNS zone should be created.
Optional. The Resource Id of the existing Azure Table Storage Private DNS Zone.
Optional. Determines if the Azure Key Vault private DNS zone should be created.
Optional. The Resource Id of the existing Azure Key Vault Private DNS Zone.
Optional. Determines if the AVD feed private DNS zone should be created.
Optional. The Resource Id of the existing AVD Feed Private DNS Zone.
Optional. Determines if the AVD global feed private DNS zone should be created.
Optional. The Resource Id of the existing AVD Global Feed Private DNS Zone.
Optional. Determines if the Azure Web App private DNS zone should be created.
Optional. The Resource Id of the existing Azure Web App Private DNS Zone.
Optional. Determines if the private DNS zones should be linked to a new virtual network.

Conditional. The resource id of the virtual network to link the private DNS zones to. Required when "linkPrivateDnsZonesToNewVnet" is "false" and any of the private DNS Zones are deployed or resource Ids provided.
Optional. The tags by resource type to apply to the resources.
DO NOT MODIFY THIS VALUE! The timeStamp is needed to differentiate deployments for certain Azure resources and must be set using a parameter.

variables.createPrivateDNSZones: [or(or(or(or(or(or(or(or(parameters('createAzureBackupZone'), parameters('createAzureBlobZone')), parameters('createAzureFilesZone')), parameters('createAzureQueueZone')), parameters('createAzureTableZone')), parameters('createAzureKeyVaultZone')), parameters('createAvdFeedZone')), parameters('createAvdGlobalFeedZone')), parameters('createAzureWebAppZone'))]

variables.commercialKmsRoutes: [if(equals(variables('azureCloud'), 'AzureCloud'), createArray(createObject('name', 'DirectRouteToKMS01', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', '20.118.99.224/32', 'hasBgpOverride', true(), 'nextHopType', 'Internet')), createObject('name', 'DirectRouteToKMS02', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', '40.83.235.53/32', 'hasBgpOverride', true(), 'nextHopType', 'Internet')), createObject('name', 'DirectRouteToKMS03', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', '23.102.135.246/32', 'hasBgpOverride', true(), 'nextHopType', 'Internet'))), createArray())]
variables.govKmsRoutes: [if(equals(variables('azureCloud'), 'AzureUSGovernment'), createArray(createObject('name', 'DirectRouteToKMS01', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', '23.97.0.13/32', 'hasBgpOverride', true(), 'nextHopType', 'Internet')), createObject('name', 'DirectRouteToKMS02', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', '52.126.105.2/32', 'hasBgpOverride', true(), 'nextHopType', 'Internet'))), createArray())]
variables.nsgRules_ManagedShortpath: [if(parameters('rdpShortpathManagedNetworks'), createArray(createObject('name', 'RDPShortpathManagedNetworks', 'properties', createObject('priority', 150, 'access', 'Allow', 'description', 'Allow inbound UDP 3390 from VirtualNetwork for RDP Shortpath on managed networks (ExpressRoute/VPN).', 'destinationAddressPrefix', 'VirtualNetwork', 'direction', 'Inbound', 'sourcePortRange', '*', 'destinationPortRange', '3390', 'protocol', 'Udp', 'sourceAddressPrefix', 'VirtualNetwork'))), createArray())]
variables.snetFunctionApp: [if(not(empty(variables('faSubnetsList'))), createArray(createObject('name', variables('faSubnetsList')[0].name, 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', variables('faSubnetsList')[0].addressPrefix, 'natGateway', if(variables('deployNatGateway'), createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/natGateways', parameters('natGatewayName'))), null()), 'routeTable', if(not(equals(parameters('defaultRouting'), 'nat')), createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/routeTables', parameters('routeTableName'))), null()), 'delegations', createArray(createObject('name', 'Microsoft.Web/serverFarms', 'properties', createObject('ServiceName', 'Microsoft.Web/serverFarms')))))), createArray())]

properties.routes: [if(not(empty(variables('effectiveBypassRoutes'))), concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'DefaultRoute', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', '0.0.0.0/0', 'nextHopType', 'VirtualAppliance', 'nextHopIpAddress', parameters('nvaIPAddress')))), variables('effectiveBypassRoutes')), createArray(createObject('name', 'DefaultRoute', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', '0.0.0.0/0', 'nextHopType', 'VirtualAppliance', 'nextHopIpAddress', parameters('nvaIPAddress')))))]

parameters.privateDnsZonesVnetId: [if(not(empty(parameters('privateDnsZonesVnetId'))), createObject('value', parameters('privateDnsZonesVnetId')), if(parameters('linkPrivateDnsZonesToNewVnet'), createObject('value', reference(subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('Network-Resources-{0}', parameters('timeStamp'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.vNetResourceId.value), createObject('value', '')))]
